disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Americans on hantavirus-infected ship end quarantine - NBC News
updates.body_en: Americans on hantavirus-infected ship end quarantine NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 美国汉坦病毒感染邮轮乘客结束隔离。

updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC to End Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ

updates.body_en: Local influencer returns home after quarantine following hantavirus outbreak on ship NBC Boston
